svg.title: Wiki Forge reframed as a decision provenance engine with three output layers
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing how Wiki Forge ingests code, git history, and PRs and produces three types of output: human wiki, AI context files, and knowledge risk reports
svg.text: Wiki Forge — the decision provenance engine
Not "docs from code" — institutional memory from your repo

g.text: Inputs — what your repo already contains

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the human-readable wiki output for Wiki Forge with decision context')
sendPrompt('Design the AI context file generation for Wiki Forge — CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md')
sendPrompt('Design the knowledge risk report for engineering managers')

svg.text: Tagline: "Your codebase remembers. Even when your team forgets."
Buyer: Engineering manager scared of knowledge loss
